channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rep. Robert Garcia Criticizes Pam Bondi for Shifting Responsibility in Epstein Investigation Testimony
item.description: Representative Robert Garcia, the ranking Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, criticized former Attorney General Pam Bondi during an appearance on MS NOW, accusing her of attempting to shift re...

item.title: Bondi Tells Congress DOJ Removed Epstein Island Photo After Staff Questioned Its Authenticity
item.description: A newly released congressional transcript reveals that former Attorney General Pam Bondi provided a different explanation from the Justice Department's public account regarding the temporary removal o...

item.title: Hunter Biden Criticizes Jake Tapper and Stephen Miller in a Series of Posts on X
item.description: Hunter Biden drew attention on social media after publishing a series of posts on X in which he sharply criticized CNN anchor Jake Tapper and White House official Stephen Miller. The posts marked a co...

item.title: Nancy Pelosi clashes with LindellTV reporter during Capitol hallway exchange over January 6 claims
item.description: Former House Speaker Nancy Pelosi was involved in a heated exchange with a conservative journalist in the halls of the U.S. Capitol on Thursday. The confrontation began when Alison Steinberg, a corres...

item.title: Report Finds Nearly 100 Pardoned January 6 Defendants Later Faced New Criminal Charges
item.description: A report highlighted by Lawfare found that at least 97 individuals who received clemency from President Donald Trump for their involvement in the January 6, 2021 Capitol attack have since been charged...

item.title: Targeted Cancer Therapies Are Extending Survival and Allowing More Patients to Live Longer With the Disease
item.description: Advances in targeted cancer therapies and precision medicine are allowing a growing number of patients to live longer with cancer, according to experts and data presented at the American Society of Cl...

item.title: Study Identifies Genetic Similarities Between Cat and Human Cancers, Highlighting Potential for Dual Treatments
item.description: A new international study suggests that researching cancer in domestic cats could provide valuable insights into human cancers due to significant genetic similarities between the two species. Led by s...

item.title: GE Aerospace Completes Qualification of 600-Volt Power Electronics for Future U.S. Army Combat Vehicles
item.description: GE Aerospace has successfully completed qualification testing for two advanced high-voltage power electronics systems designed to support the U.S. Army’s transition toward more electrically powered co...

item.title: Leaked Correspondence Suggests King Charles Had Concerns About Hosting Trump During 2025 State Visit
item.description: A report by The i Paper, cited by Raw Story, claims that leaked emails and messages indicate King Charles III privately expressed concerns about hosting U.S. President Donald Trump during his state vi...

item.title: Jennifer Aniston and Lisa Kudrow Reflect on ‘Friends,’ Discuss AI and Consider a Future Sitcom With Courteney Cox

item.title: Analyst Says Marco Rubio Has Gained Favor With Trump Over JD Vance Amid Iran Policy Disputes

item.title: Pardoned January 6 Participant Assigned to Pentagon Special Operations Office
item.description: According to a report cited by The New York Times, Elias Irizarry, a participant in the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot who was later pardoned by President Donald Trump, has been hired to work at the Pe...

item.title: Nottingham Forest Turn Down Manchester City's Initial Offer for Midfielder Elliot Anderson
item.description: Nottingham Forest have reportedly rejected Manchester City's first offer for midfielder Elliot Anderson as the Premier League champions continue their efforts to strengthen their squad ahead of the su...

item.title: Former Senator Bill Cassidy Joins Democratic Challenge to Treasury Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: A legal challenge has been filed against the Trump administration's so-called Anti-Weaponization Fund, a Treasury Department program valued at approximately $1.776 billion. The fund was created follow...

item.title: Questions Raised Over Tommy Tuberville's Residency After Records Show He Voted in Florida in 2018
item.description: A report by AL.com columnist Kyle Whitmire has renewed scrutiny over U.S. Senator Tommy Tuberville's residency history and his eligibility to run for governor of Alabama. The investigation focuses on ...

item.title: Fox News Poll Shows Declining Trump Approval Ratings in Ohio Ahead of Midterm Elections
item.description: A new Fox News poll highlighted by CNN anchor Dana Bash suggests that President Donald Trump may be facing growing political challenges in Ohio as the 2026 midterm elections approach. According to the...

item.title: Arizona Attorney General to Seek Fresh Indictment Against Trump Allies in 2020 Election Interference Case
item.description: Democratic Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes announced plans to pursue a new indictment against several allies of President Donald Trump who were involved in efforts to challenge the 2020 presidenti...

item.title: Rosalind Russell’s Rise to Hollywood Stardom During the 1930s
item.description: This article highlights a collection of photographs documenting actress Rosalind Russell during the 1930s, a pivotal decade in her career. After beginning as a Broadway performer, Russell transitioned...

item.title: Conservative commentators criticize Candace Owens over appearance at Russia's St. Petersburg forum
item.description: Conservative media personality Candace Owens has come under criticism from several prominent figures on the American right after attending the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum in Russia, an...

item.title: Michelle Phillips’ Career Reinvention in the 1970s: Acting, Music, and Hollywood Fame
item.description: The article highlights Michelle Phillips’ transformation during the 1970s after the final breakup of The Mamas & the Papas in 1971. Rather than remaining defined by her success in the influential 1960...
